topWPAPlays.description: Brandon Valenzuela doubles (6) on a fly ball to left fielder Jarren Duran. Ernie Clement scores.
Caleb Durbin homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field.
Isiah Kiner-Falefa homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.
Vladimir Guerrero Jr. homers (4) on a line drive to center field.
Wilyer Abreu flies out to center fielder Myles Straw.
Travis Bazzana homers (5) on a fly ball to right field.
Kyle Manzardo homers (8) on a fly ball to right field.
Christian Yelich strikes out swinging.
Andrew Vaughn grounds out, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins.
Joey Ortiz grounds into a double play, third baseman Gabriel Arias to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Cooper Pratt out at 2nd. Joey Ortiz out at 1st.
Brooks Lee homers (12) on a line drive to right field. Kody Clemens scores. Josh Bell scores.
Josh Bell singles on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Trevor Larnach scores. Kody Clemens to 3rd.
Trevor Larnach homers (5) on a fly ball to center field. Luke Keaschall scores.
Royce Lewis strikes out swinging.
Kody Clemens singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Alejandro Osuna. Trevor Larnach to 3rd.
Colt Emerson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Leody Taveras. Dominic Canzone scores. Cole Young scores.
Cole Young doubles (11) on a line drive to left fielder Taylor Ward. Josh Naylor scores. Dominic Canzone to 3rd.
Blaze Alexander grounds into a force out, shortstop Colt Emerson to third baseman J.P. Crawford. Leody Taveras out at 3rd. Colton Cowser to 2nd. Blaze Alexander to 1st.
Colton Cowser walks.
Jackson Holliday flies out to center fielder Victor Robles.
Marcus Semien triples (1) on a fly ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Mark Vientos scores. Zack Short scores.
Eric Wagaman singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Derek Hill. Carson Benge scores. Mark Vientos to 2nd.
Derek Hill singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder A.J. Ewing. Bryson Stott scores. Derek Hill to 2nd. Derek Hill advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder A.J. Ewing.
Alec Bohm doubles (10) on a fly ball to right fielder Carson Benge. Kyle Schwarber scores.
A.J. Ewing doubles (6) on a line drive to right fielder Brandon Marsh. Jared Young scores.
Andrew Benintendi hits a grand slam (9) to right center field. Sam Antonacci scores. Jacob Gonzalez scores. Tristan Peters scores.
Sam Antonacci doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jasson Domínguez.
Ryan McMahon homers (8) on a fly ball to left center field.
Tristan Peters hit by pitch. Sam Antonacci to 3rd. Jacob Gonzalez to 2nd.
Colson Montgomery homers (20) on a fly ball to center field.
Jordan Walker reaches on a fielder's choice. JJ Wetherholt scores. Iván Herrera to 3rd. Fielding error by shortstop Bobby Witt Jr.
Carter Jensen doubles (15) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Nelson Velázquez. Salvador Perez scores.
Bobby Witt Jr. homers (10) on a fly ball to left center field.
Michael Massey reaches on a fielding error by left fielder Nelson Velázquez. Isaac Collins scores. Michael Massey to 2nd.
Isaac Collins doubles (9) on a ground ball to left fielder Nelson Velázquez. Carter Jensen scores.
Shea Langeliers homers (19) on a fly ball to center field. Zack Gelof scores. Nick Kurtz scores.

Christian Moore strikes out swinging.
